title: Benchmarking cell-type clustering methods for spatially resolved transcriptomics data.
author: Cheng A Hu G Li WV
content: S-EPMC9851325 PMC9851325 Benchmarking cell-type clustering methods for spatially resolved transcriptomics data. Spatially resolved transcriptomics technologies enable the measurement of transcriptome information while retaining the spatial context at the regional, cellular or sub-cellular level
